title: The Provider Problem
description: When I started Dairector, I only supported Ollama. It was simple: one provider, one API, one response format. Then I wanted to add OpenAI support. Then Anthropic. Then someone asked about Groq.

title: The Race Condition That Broke Me
tags: state-management, immutability, architecture, race-conditions, pipeline, engineering
description: I was demoing Dairector to a friend. The pipeline was running — IDEA had completed, ANALYZE was generating the design — when I clicked “cancel” because I wanted to show something else.

title: The All-LLM Trap
description: In early 2025, there was a trend: build everything with LLMs. Want to write code? LLM. Want to run tests? LLM. Want to deploy? LLM.
